title: Need a date parameter settings option in widgets to compare points in time on a dashboard
excerpt: We currently have a dashboard with widgets that offer a quick glimpse into real-time quantity of specific items on a board. We need to be able to capture and compare in a snapshot or side-by-side the historical happening…

posts.author: jtholmer (Jeni Tholmer)
posts.cookedHtml: We currently have a dashboard with widgets that offer a quick glimpse into real-time quantity of specific items on a board. We need to be able to capture and compare in a snapshot or side-by-side the historical happenings of this data. Adding a filter for date does not fully satisfy this because we also need information to the hour to be able to analyze changes within a given day.
